resources.string: Mic + accel + light: ready. Grant mic permission when prompted.

Choose the true environment, then record 3 seconds. Each clip is saved as a WAV under audio/ and one line is appended to dataset.csv (same columns as the training CSV). Copy the whole SmartAmbientField folder to your PC for retraining.
Pick a label and tap record.
No light sensor — lux columns are 0.
Microphone permission is required to log audio.
